commentaries.author: Clement Of Alexandria
commentaries.content: For as it is enjoined on them, "to be subject to their masters with all fear, not only to the good and gentle, but also to the froward"

commentaries.author: The Apostolic Constitutions
commentaries.content: But as to servants, what can we say more than that the slave bring a good will to his master, with the fear of God, although he be impious and wicked,

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
